creator: hanahara@meiko.co.jp
text:
I found that deadlock related patch is not applied to 
ports-current/databases/postgresql7. 

I found this patch in pgsql-bugs@postgresql.org mailing list 
archives.

> http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00002.php
> http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00011.php
> http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00013.php
> http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00033.php

Fix: 

See http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00013.php
How-To-Repeat: See http://archives2.us.postgresql.org/pgsql-bugs/2001-09/msg00002.php
